items.title: Karnataka Professor Proposes To Student In Front Of Class, Beaten On Campus

items.title: 'Our home is gone': BBC speaks to displaced families in Lebanon
items.dek: The BBC's Hugo Bachega speaks to families in Beirut as more than a million people have been displaced in Lebanon.
items.body: The BBC's Hugo Bachega speaks to families in Beirut as more than a million people have been displaced in Lebanon.
